name: NymVPN
tagline: Decentralised mixnet VPN that hides metadata, not just your IP, with a 5-hop noise-generating mix network.

logging.summary: Zero-knowledge architecture: Nym states no point on the network, neither Nym nor the node operators, can link your identity to your activity. zk-nym anonymous credentials decouple payment from traffic. The no-logs property rests on the decentralised mixnet design rather than a dedicated no-logs audit.

technical.proprietaryProtocol: Nym Noise-Generating Mixnet, 5-hop Sphinx routing with cover traffic (Anonymous Mode); AmneziaWG/WireGuard 2-hop (Fast Mode)

encryption.handshake: Sphinx layered encryption; BLAKE2; post-quantum planned

audits.scope: Apps, backend/API, infrastructure & cryptography (generally strong posture; some medium-severity backend issues)

transparency.realWorldNoLog: Not yet tested by a public seizure or subpoena; protection rests on a decentralised mixnet where node operators cannot see who is communicating with whom.

bestFor: High-risk users who need metadata protection, not just IP-hiding
Activists, journalists and crypto users facing traffic-analysis adversaries
People who want anonymous payment (Monero, Zcash, cash, GNU Taler)
notFor: Streaming / high-bandwidth use in Anonymous Mode (5 hops add latency)
Users wanting a large country/server menu like a commercial VPN
People who want a mature, set-and-forget consumer app
pros: 5-hop noise-generating mixnet resists the traffic-correlation attacks ordinary VPNs can't
Fully open-source clients (Rust) with a strong public audit trail (Aumasson 2021, Oak 2023, Cure53 2024)
Outside 14 Eyes (Switzerland); zk-nym credentials decouple payment from traffic
Wide anonymous payment: Monero, Zcash, Bitcoin, $NYM, cash, GNU Taler
cons: Anonymous Mode's 5 hops add real latency vs a normal VPN
Younger product; smaller network and fewer consumer conveniences
No dedicated independent no-logs audit (protection is architectural); some past audits flagged backend issues since addressed
No OpenVPN; some features (split tunnelling) still in beta
notes: Built on the Nym mixnet (NYM token). Two modes: 2-hop 'Fast' (AmneziaWG/WireGuard) and 5-hop 'Anonymous' (Sphinx with continuous cover traffic). Up to 10 devices. Cure53's July 2024 assessment found a generally strong posture with some medium-severity backend DoS issues; the Coconut/e-cash cryptography was reviewed without exploitable leaks.

sources.label: Nym, features (modes, kill switch, DNS, platforms)
